ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Marinated Chicken (32%) [Chicken Maryland (31%), Paprika, Brown Sugar, Lemon Pepper Seasoning (Contains Food Acid (330), Flavour Enhancer (635), Spice Extract (160c))], Sweet Potato Chips (32%) [Sweet Potato (31%), Salt, Thyme, Pepper), Broccoli (23%), Tuscan Gravy (13%) [Water, Gravy Powder (1%) (Contains Milk & Soybean), Chicken Flavoured Stock (Contains Flavour Enhancer (635), Food Acid (330)), Tomato Paste (Contains Acidity Regulator (330)), Tuscan Seasoning (0.04%), Pepper].
